code: const touched = []; const removed = []; async function get(id) { return await figma.getNodeByIdAsync(id); } async function loadTextNodeFonts(node) { if (!node || node.type !== 'TEXT') return; const fonts = node.getRangeAllFontNames(0, node.characters.length); const seen = new Set(); for (const font of fonts) { const key = JSON.stringify(font); if (seen.has(key)) continue; seen.add(key); await figma.loadFontAsync(font); } } async function setText(id, value) { const node = await get(id); if (!node || node.type !== 'TEXT') return; await loadTextNodeFonts(node); node.characters = value; touched.push(id); } for (const id of ['1:706','1:707','1:708','1:709','1:710','1:711','1:712','1:713','1:714']) { const node = await get(id); if (node) { node.remove(); removed.push(id); } } const stockFrame = await get('1:129'); const bottomBar = await get('1:945'); const oldBottomNav = await get('1:166'); if (oldBottomNav) { oldBottomNav.remove(); removed.push('1:166'); } if (stockFrame && bottomBar && 'appendChild' in stockFrame) { stockFrame.appendChild(bottomBar); bottomBar.x = -11; bottomBar.y = 750; try { if ('resize' in bottomBar) bottomBar.resize(390, 76); } catch (error) {} touched.push('1:945', '1:129'); } const estimatorFrame = await get('1:24'); const navSource = await get('1:321'); let navCloneId = null; if (estimatorFrame && navSource && 'appendChild' in estimatorFrame && 'clone' in navSource) { const navClone = navSource.clone(); estimatorFrame.appendChild(navClone); navClone.x = 200; navClone.y = 30; navClone.opacity = 0.9; navCloneId = navClone.id; touched.push(navClone.id, '1:24'); } await setText('1:702', 'Live Library Imports + Applied'); await setText('1:703', 'Real iOS Navigation Bar and Tab Bar remain on the board. A Material 3 Bottom app bar now drives page 03 directly inside the product flow.'); await setText('1:704', 'iOS 18 · Navigation Bar'); await setText('1:705', 'iOS 18 · Tab Bar'); const selection = []; for (const id of ['1:24','1:76','1:129','1:701']) { const node = await get(id); if (node) selection.push(node); } figma.currentPage.selection = selection; if (selection.length) figma.viewport.scrollAndZoomIntoView(selection); return { removed, navCloneId, bottomBarId: bottomBar ? bottomBar.id : null, touchedNodeIds: Array.from(new Set([...touched, ...removed, ...selection.map((node) => node.id)])) };
